idea-plugin.name: GitHub Dark Pure Black
idea-plugin.description:
GitHub Dark — Pure Black

A no-compromise pure black (#000000) variant of GitHub Dark for IntelliJ Platform IDEs. Built to feel like a TUI — flat, quiet, zero chrome tint.

What's pure black

  • Editor pane, gutter, console, terminal
  • All tool windows (Project view, Terminal, Services, Build, Run, Debug, Commit)
  • Tab bar, main toolbar, status bar, popups, dialogs, menus
  • Text fields, combo boxes, dropdowns

Visual separation

Subtle #30363d 1px borders between panels so you can tell them apart without sacrificing the flat black look. Uses GitHub Primer border.default.

Bundled bonuses (opt-in)

  • Keymap — "Vedhavyas Mac" (Mac OS X with two tweaks: Cmd+Enter for Claude Code GUI chat newline, Alt+N for New Element)
  • Code style — "Vedhavyas Default" (Python/Rust/Terraform/Protobuf indent preferences)

Setup after install

  • Settings → Appearance & Behavior → Appearance → Theme → "GitHub Dark Pure Black"
  • Settings → Editor → Color Scheme → "GitHub Dark Pure Black"
  • (Optional) Settings → Keymap → "Vedhavyas Mac"
  • (Optional) Settings → Editor → Code Style → "Vedhavyas Default"

Parent

Extends IntelliJ's built-in Islands Dark. Fully compatible with the modern Islands UI.

Fonts

Bundled editor scheme references Fira Code. Install via brew install --cask font-fira-code on macOS. If not installed, IDEA falls back to another monospace.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.0

  • Added bundled keymap "Vedhavyas Mac" — Mac OS X keymap with custom shortcuts for Claude Code GUI and New Element menu
  • Added bundled code style "Vedhavyas Default" — indent preferences for Python, Rust, Terraform, Protobuf
  • Both keymap and code style are opt-in — select from Settings after install; theme works standalone

1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Pure black (#000000) UI theme extending Islands Dark
  • Bundled editor color scheme with pure-black editor, gutter, console backgrounds
  • Subtle #30363d borders between panels
  • Fira Code 14pt, ligatures enabled
